title: Enhanced Quality
description: This modpack improves performance, visuals, sounds, and quality-of-life using popular mods and resource packs like Sodium, Iris, Fresh Animations, Complementary Shaders, Visuality, Zoomify, and Lithium.
body:
## Make Minecraft Feel Better Than Ever
The **Enhanced Quality** modpack is focused on making Minecraft feel **smoother**, **better-looking**, and more **immersive** while keeping it **vanilla-friendly**. It improves visuals, sounds, performance, and adds small quality-of-life features that make the game **more enjoyable** overall.

### 🚀 Features

- ⚡ Smoother gameplay with optimization mods included
- 🎨 Better visuals, particles, effects, and shader support
- 🔊 Improved ambient, environmental, and immersive sounds
- 🖥️ UI improvements, smoother scrolling, and controller support, world hosting
- 🧰 Quality-of-life features like inventory sorting, zoom, and fast reloading 
- 🎒 Includes shaders and resource packs out of the box
- 🎮 Fully client-side and multiplayer compatible


## 🔗 Other Packs in the Enhanced Series

- **[Technically Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/modpack/technically-enhanced)**  
  Vanilla-friendly with technical mods like Litematica, Carpet, and Tweakeroo.


- **[Enhanced FPS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-fps)**  
  Lightweight pack focused entirely on maximizing performance. 

- **[Enhanced FPS NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-fps-forge)**  
  NeoForge version of the pack.
